text:
CMS and Medicare Advantage (MA) plans use the MARx System to exchange data files and reports 
between the Plans and CMS. The capitation payments provided to MA and Medicare Advantage 
Prescription Drug (MAPD) sponsors are calculated and paid monthly. 

CCW obtains both the monthly Part A and Part B capitated premium payment information. The dollar 
amounts reflect the final beneficiary payments and adjustments. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
